title: Bolsius Smooth Tapered Candles - Metallic Red - Set of 4 in Box - 24.5 cm - Decorative Household Candles - Burning Time 7 Hours - Unscented - Natural Plant Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: Discover the Essentials collection, the smooth, metallic table candles from Bolsius! The smooth table candle in metallic red is 24.5 cm high and thanks to our MaxAmbiance technology for up to 7 hours drip-free. This technology combines a unique formula with a specially selected wick for perfect burning performance.
Sparkling red makes everything more beautiful! This red color with metallic finish guarantees success in creating a trendy touch.

High-quality candles are characterised by their long burning time and their shape retention. The bolsius Special Essentials candles have a special design and do not drip. They are made from natural vegan wax from Europe and are free from palm oil.

bolsius Special Essentials Metallic Candles are essential in any interior. Different sizes and shades can be combined according to personal preference. Unconventional and trendy! Made with great passion for humans and planet, with natural vegan wax made from olive, sunflower or rapeseed oil and without palm oil. Every season we introduce new trendy colours so you can keep your interior up to date

Since 1870, bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you can create an atmosphere of cosiness and well-being in your home. We do this with passion, know-how and with respect for people and planet. bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that excite your senses. Make every moment special. For you, and for everyone around you.
description: Product Description Discover the Essentials collection, the smooth, metallic table candles from Bolsius! The smooth table candle in metallic red is 24.5 cm high and thanks to our MaxAmbiance technology for up to 7 hours drip-free. This technology combines a unique formula with a specially selected wick for perfect burning performance. Safety Warning Place the product in a safe place, away from combustible materials and out of direct sunlight. Use a sturdy candlestick or candleholder, and make sure that the candle can't fall over. If you place several candles together, place them 10cm apart so that they don't get warped from the heat. Straighten the wick before lighting it and use a candle snuffer to avoid splashing.
